title: Fix 10 easy bugs + write tests
objective: Fix all 10 top-priority critical bugs from code review: JSON schema types, ProGuard, permissions, ANR, concurrency, privacy, OOM, SIGSEGV, camera race
scope: ToolDefinitions, GeminiMeetingService, GeminiLiveClient, AudioRecorder, CameraCaptureHelper, MemoryDbHelper, GoogleDriveServiceHelper, DocumentSelector, AndroidManifest, XML resources, ProGuard, MeetingActivity, FloatingWidgetService, SmartNotificationListenerService, DatingRouterAgent, DatingSkillAgentImpl, DatingAnalysisOrchestrator, MeetingRecordingService
completed: ToolDefinitions: lowercase all JSON schema types (OBJECT→object, STRING→string, INTEGER→integer, ARRAY→array)
GeminiMeetingService: lowercase all JSON schema types
AndroidManifest: add POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission for API 33+
GeminiLiveClient: add @Volatile to isConnected flag
AudioRecorder: add @Volatile to isRecording flag
AudioRecorder: join recording thread before release() to prevent SIGSEGV
CameraCaptureHelper: add @Volatile to isCameraActive flag
CameraCaptureHelper: add @Volatile stopped flag + check in onOpened to prevent camera leak race
MemoryDbHelper: add ORDER BY last_accessed_time DESC to getMemoryList
MemoryDbHelper: escape % and _ wildcards in searchMemories LIKE query
GoogleDriveServiceHelper: escape single quotes to prevent SQL injection in Drive API queries
DocumentSelector: also search *.txt files alongside *.json
backup_rules.xml: remove Sample template comments
data_extraction_rules.xml: remove Sample template comments
ProGuard: remove -repackageclasses to prevent ClassNotFoundException in release build
MeetingActivity: replace Thread.sleep(500) with async disconnect pattern
MeetingActivity: replace MediaPlayer.prepare() with prepareAsync() to prevent ANR
FloatingWidgetService: move startForeground() to top of onCreate() to prevent service crash
FloatingWidgetService: replace companion object instance with WeakReference to prevent context leak
SmartNotificationListenerService: strip message body from Gemini prompt (privacy fix)
DatingRouterAgent: add withTimeout(30s) to deferred.await() to prevent coroutine hang
DatingSkillAgentImpl: add withTimeout(30s) to deferred.await() to prevent coroutine hang
DatingAnalysisOrchestrator: add withTimeout(30s) to deferred.await() to prevent coroutine hang
MeetingRecordingService: replace Channel(UNLIMITED) with BUFFERED + DROP_OLDEST to prevent OOM
Write ToolDefinitionsUnitTest.kt: 5 unit tests for type casing, uniqueness, required params
Write BugFixVerificationTest.kt: 9 AndroidJUnit4 tests verifying all fixes in first batch

artifacts.description: Unit tests for ToolDefinitions JSON schema
Integration tests verifying all bug fixes

decisions.decision: ใช้ WeakReference สำหรับ FloatingWidgetService.instance แทน direct reference
decisions.rationale: ป้องกัน context leak — service instance ถูก held โดย static field ทำให้ GC ไม่สามารถเก็บ service ได้
alternatives: ใช้ applicationContext ตลอด
คง direct reference ไว้

knowledge: Gemini API requires lowercase JSON Schema types (object, string, integer) — uppercase types silently ignored
Google Drive API query strings need single quotes escaped by doubling ('' → )
SQLite LIKE wildcards % and _ must be escaped when searching user-provided strings
@Volatile annotation ensures visibility of flags across threads in Kotlin
ProGuard -repackageclasses moves all classes into a single package, breaking AndroidManifest component references
MediaPlayer.prepare() is synchronous and blocks the main thread — always use prepareAsync()
FloatingWidgetService must call startForeground() before or immediately after super.onCreate() or Android kills the service
CompletableDeferred.await() without timeout can hang forever if the callback is never invoked — always wrap in withTimeout
Channel(UNLIMITED) can cause OOM under backpressure — use BUFFERED + DROP_OLDEST for streaming audio

risks.risk: WeakReference อาจทำให้ instance เป็น null ในบาง race condition

next_steps: Run full test suite to verify all fixes compile and pass
Deploy APK to connected phone for real-device testing
Address remaining Major issues from bug report if needed
context_summary: Fixed all 10 top-priority bugs from code review across 15+ files. First batch (11 fixes) committed earlier. Second batch (14 additional fixes) covers ProGuard, ANR, service crash, privacy leak, coroutine hang, OOM, SIGSEGV, and camera race conditions — all critical for production stability.
